sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, values Array(Int32), is_valid Nullable(Boolean));
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) AS shuffled_values FROM test_table WHERE is_valid = 1;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(arrayShuffle(values, 17), 41) AS double_shuffled FROM test_table;
SELECT id, multiIf(arrayShuffle(values) = [], 'empty', arrayShuffle(values) = [1, 2], 'one two', 'other') AS shuffle_check FROM test_table;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) AS shuffled_values FROM test_table WHERE multiIf(is_valid IS NULL, 1, is_valid = 1) = 1;
WITH (SELECT arrayShuffle([1, 2, 3]) AS my_array) AS t SELECT id, multiIf(2 IN my_array, 'contains 2', 'does not contain 2') AS presence_check FROM test_table;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) AS shuffled_values FROM (SELECT id, values FROM test_table WHERE is_valid IS NOT NULL) AS valid_values WHERE id < (SELECT max(id) FROM test_table);
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) AS shuffled FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING shuffled IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) AS random_values FROM (SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) AS inner_shuffle FROM test_table WHERE is_valid = 0) AS inner_query;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE is_valid IS NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, arrayShuffle([NULL, 1, 2]) AS new_values, NULL FROM test_table;
SELECT id, multiIf(new_values[1] IS NULL, 'first is null', 'first is not null') AS check_first FROM temp_table;
SELECT values, multiIf(arrayShuffle(values) = arrayShuffle(values), 'same', 'different') AS comparison FROM test_table;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) AS shuffled_col FROM (SELECT id, arrayShuffle([1, 1, 1]) AS single_value_array FROM test_table) AS temp;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values, 10) AS shuffled_with_seed FROM test_table WHERE is_valid IS NOT NULL AND id >= 1 AND id <= (SELECT COALESCE(max(id), 0) FROM test_table);
